title: STM32 substrate — local host tool discovery
description: Machine-local tool path discovery for the six ST vendor CLIs plus the STM32CubeCLT umbrella install. Loaded by SubstrateContext.from_environment() and validated at load time (M-016). v1 supports Linux and Windows as first-class hosts per ADR-007 (supersedes ADR-005); the loader reads the linux or windows candidate block keyed on sys.platform. The darwin block is reserved (macOS deferred pending demand).

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for IDE validation; substrate ignores.

version.description: Schema version. Pinned to 1 for v1.

programmer.description: Cubeprogrammer-related host-local config that is not strictly a tool path.

default_probe_sn.description: Default ST-LINK serial used by every per-target tool method when caller does not override. Loaded into SubstrateContext.default_probe_sn. Env var override: STM32_PROGRAMMER_DEFAULT_SN.

tools.description: Machine-local tool discovery overrides keyed by supported tool name. Resolution order per ADR-007: env var -> configured candidates -> shutil.which against executable_name -> loud ConfigurationError naming the JSON key.

cube_programmer.description: STM32CubeProgrammer CLI (STM32_Programmer_CLI). Primary consumer: cubeprogrammer module. Also read by debug for the -cp argument to gdbserver and as the third SVD-source root.

cubeide.description: STM32CubeIDE install root. Used by cubeide module for headless-build.sh discovery and by debug as the first-priority SVD-source root (per debug-api Q5).

cubemx.description: STM32CubeMX launcher binary (cubemx-api Q3: launcher-only in v1, no jar fallback).

stlink_gdb_server.description: ST-LINK GDB server. Used by debug module for live debugging sessions.

arm_gdb.description: arm-none-eabi-gdb client (MI3 mode in v1 per debug-api Q3).

stm32_signing_tool_cli.description: STM32_SigningTool_CLI. Used by signing module for F-013 trusted-binary signing. STM32N6 / MP1 / MP2 only per SC-009 / UM2543 Table 1. Typically bundled with the STM32CubeCLT umbrella install at <clt>/STM32CubeProgrammer/bin/STM32_SigningTool_CLI.

stm32cubeclt.description: STM32CubeCLT umbrella install root. Used by debug module as the fallback SVD-source root (priority order: cubeide -> cube_programmer -> stm32cubeclt per debug-api P-033). Optional; substrate degrades gracefully when fewer than three SVD sources are present.

env_var.description: Environment variable checked before config candidates and PATH lookup.

executable_name.description: Executable or launcher basename used for shutil.which fallback when no explicit path candidate resolves.

candidates.description: Per-platform candidate paths checked before generic PATH fallback. v1 reads `linux` and `windows`, keyed on sys.platform, per ADR-007; `darwin` is reserved (macOS deferred pending demand).

linux.description: Ordered candidate paths checked on Linux hosts (v1 first-class per ADR-007).

windows.description: Ordered candidate paths checked on Windows hosts (v1 first-class per ADR-007).

darwin.description: Ordered candidate paths checked on macOS hosts (reserved; macOS deferred pending demand).
